title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 12 - 2017: Hidden Valia

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder, explaining a Google Earth project he's building called 'Hidden Valley' — a modeled ancient city-state within his fictional 'Kingdom of Boulder' — using Mantinea, an intact ancient Greek walled city, as his template for a 4km circumference, 10,000-person city-state. He also gives a brief life update covering sleeping in, shampooing his car to prepare it for sale, and plans to organize his electronics.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Mantinea (4km circumference) is the ideal template for an ancient city-state because it has a perfectly intact wall and is historically significant
10,000 people is the right round number for a standardized city-state, consistent with Boulder's 1915 population and Mantinea's estimated population
He is genuinely trying to sell it but wants to clean it properly first before listing it
